fields.name: Advertisement Started
fields.message_template: Your advertisement '{{ad_title}}' is now running from {{start_date}} to {{end_date}}. Thank you for advertising with ChargeGhar!
fields.description: Notification sent when scheduled ad starts running

fields.name: Advertisement Completed
fields.message_template: Your advertisement '{{ad_title}}' has completed its {{duration_days}}-day run ({{start_date}} to {{end_date}}). Thank you for choosing ChargeGhar!
fields.description: Notification sent when ad campaign completes

fields.name: Advertisement Payment Reminder
fields.message_template: Your advertisement '{{ad_title}}' was approved on {{approved_at}} but payment of Rs. {{admin_price}} is still pending. Please complete payment to schedule your ad.
fields.description: Reminder sent for ads pending payment > 24 hours
